work.title: Data & AI Engineer Masterarbeit
work.description: **Topic:** *Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems: A Synthetic Benchmark Generation Approach*. Designed a scalable evaluation framework for **tool-using LLM agents** with explicit failure localization across multi-turn trajectories. Built a **LangGraph-based synthetic benchmark generation pipeline** to produce controlled yet diverse interaction traces for stress-testing agent planning and retrieval behavior. Developed an unsupervised auditing framework to evaluate and scale **RAG** performance across **4M+ enterprise records**, with a focus on reliability and operational readiness.

work.title: AI Research Engineer Werkstudent
work.description: Industrialized multiple AI systems spanning **KG-RAG**, **Agentic AI**, **Digital Product Passports**, and **Industry 4.0** use cases. Built robust pipelines for information extraction, retrieval, reasoning, and anomaly detection across distributed systems. Designed multi-agent workflows combining **graph traversal**, **tool calling**, **retrieval**, and self-correction loops to improve factuality and end-to-end task completion in enterprise scenarios.

work.title: Big Data Platform Engineer
work.description: Engineered **CI/CD frameworks** and deployment tooling for distributed **OCI** big data services. Built automated testing and release-validation infrastructure to improve reliability, reduce deployment risk, and accelerate delivery across cloud platform rollouts.

work.title: Data Science & Analytics Intern
work.description: Developed an **anomaly detection model** to identify vehicle battery depletion patterns from large-scale telemetry streams. Engineered **PySpark-based cloud services** and data workflows that increased service demand by **62%** while supporting recall-related investigations. Built NLP analytics tooling and interactive dashboards to support model iteration, operational interpretation, and faster data-informed decisions.

work.title: AI & DevOps Engineer
work.description: Managed distributed **DevOps infrastructure** with automated monitoring, testing, and deployment workflows. Developed a Dockerized API management platform integrating payments, authentication, and service observability to improve reliability and operational visibility.

work.title: Production Engineering Fellow
work.description: Completed a fellowship at Meta focused on **Linux administration**, **DevOps**, **SRE**, and scalable infrastructure practices. Automated AWS EC2 deployments using Docker and CI/CD while instrumenting production monitoring with **Prometheus** and **Grafana**.

work.title: Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer
work.description: Developed demand forecasting models and production data pipelines using **Python**, **Flask**, **SciPy**, **Prophet**, and **SQL**. Built an enterprise ERP platform with **Angular** to manage inventory, logistics, and financial workflows across business operations.

education.title: MSc. Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
education.description: **Thesis (Seminar Grade 1.0):** Evaluating **Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems** in collaboration with **BMW** and **DFKI**. Focused on **Machine Learning**, **NLP**, **Machine Translation**, **Computer Vision**, **Statistics**, **Quantum AI**, and **ML Cybersecurity**.

education.title: BSc. Computer Science
education.description: Graduated with **94.6/100 GPA**, earned a **60% merit-based scholarship**, and received a **Best GPA** distinction five times. Academic focus included **Machine Learning**, **Time Series**, **Algorithms and Optimization**, **Cloud Computing**, **Distributed Systems**, and **PLCs**.

education.title: Computer Science Exchange Student
education.description: Awarded a full **DAAD scholarship** for exchange studies in Germany. Focused on **Computer Vision**, **Autonomous Driving**, **Driver Assistance Systems**, **Human-Vehicle Interaction**, and **Statistics**.

education.title: Technologist Degree in Automation and Robotics
education.description: Focused on **Industrial Robotics**, **PLCs**, **Control Systems**, **Digital Electronics**, **Sensors**, **Instrumentation**, and industrial automation fundamentals.
